data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring. However, while the linked use case mentions AI proctoring that flags if a candidate looks away too long, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of live monitoring or AI proctoring as required. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No concrete evidence of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring functionality being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for proctoring functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.
